description_long: This object is a digital keyboard piano set on a black, X-shaped stand, with a separate microphone stand positioned nearby. The keyboard features a row of white and black keys, though the arrangement appears somewhat irregular and stylized, with some keys unevenly spaced or shaped. The body of the piano is rectangular and predominantly black, with a slightly raised, light-colored control panel or cover on top. The stand is sturdy, with intersecting legs providing stability, and the microphone stand is tall and slender, ending in a small, textured microphone head. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with a focus on function over decorative detail, and the surfaces are matte with a rough, hand-crafted look. No visible branding or logos are present, and there are no pedals or music stand attached.
description: A black digital keyboard piano on an X-shaped stand, accompanied by a tall microphone stand, with unevenly spaced keys and a rough, matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard, X-shaped stand, and microphone stand to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the piano body and the vertical microphone stand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the intersecting legs of the stand and the back of the keyboard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the piano's side profile and the microphone stand's base.
attribute_keyboard_layout: The keyboard has a single row of unevenly spaced white and black keys, with an irregular arrangement and some keys appearing misshapen or missing.
